headline: Taco Bell Parent, Data Center Play And Two Other Stocks Weather War Storm, Hover Near Highs
summary: Building construction play Argan and three other stocks are notable for scoring new highs amid recent market volatility.  Argan touched an all-time high of 469.88 in Wednesday's stock market before pulling back to its 21-day moving average.  The building and heavy construction stock has surged as artificial intelligence data centers drive up demand for power plants.

headline: Yum (YUM) Down 1.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Yum (YUM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 3 Fast Food Stocks to Buy Right Now
summary: Mcdonald's CEO posted video of new burger but viewers focused on his small bite. Burger King responded with own video and other fast-food CEOs joined in. Investors should take note of industry growth and consider Mcdonald's, trading at $326 per share, a top pick in the competitive fast-food market.
